title: ChallengeAssessment
description: Output of challenge-testing. Stress-tests a concept taxonomy against externally sourced scenarios and classifies how well it holds.

scenarios.description: Externally sourced scenarios mapped onto the concept set.

resilience.description: Overall taxonomy resilience after proposed responses are applied. 1 = brittle, 5 = robust.

notes.description: Patterns across scenarios, weak source caveats, follow-up actions.

description.description: One-paragraph description of what someone wants to do or what is happening.

source.description: Where the scenario came from (user request, support ticket, edge case, competitor feature, etc.).

outcome.description: How the scenario maps onto the taxonomy. clean = fits without strain; strained = stretches a concept's purpose; missing = no concept/action covers it; awkward = covered but composition is unnatural.

concepts_involved.description: Concepts that participated or would need to.

details.description: What specifically happens: which concept stretches, which action is missing, which composition is awkward.

proposed_response.description: What to do: extend an action, split a concept, add a concept, or accept the gap.
